creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/textproc/ibus/pkg-message?id=821d9010723d7c31c744e0d42af1e27c607e46f6> mentioned KDE4. 

KDE4 is no longer ported. 

If there's still a need to mention KDE: I guess, it should be with reference to x11/kde5 (KDE Plasma Desktop and Applications (current)) or some other metaport.
